label: Super Admin
description: System-wide owner with full access to all tenants and configurations.

label: Tenant Admin
description: Administrator for a specific hospital tenant. Can manage staff, users, and channels.

label: Doctor
description: Licensed physician. Full access to clinical channels and patient context.

label: Nurse
description: Nursing staff. Can receive urgent pages and participate in care channels.

label: Staff
description: General hospital staff with basic messaging access.
